svg.aria-label: Mock Active Directory Sites And Services Diagram

text.tspan: Mock Active Directory Sites And Services Diagram
Offline mock forest showing AD sites site links replication topology domain controllers and subnets

Site-link-derived arrows show possible topology relationships from AD configuration. They do not prove direct network reachability, active replication connections, or current KCC bridgehead selection.
Replication health rows are read-only evidence from configured connection objects and observed replication metadata. They are not remediation actions and do not prove network reachability.

Subnet is not assigned to a known AD site.
DNS queries and large DNS responses where TCP is required.
Time synchronization required for Kerberos clock-skew tolerance.
LDAP locator and related operations where required.
SYSVOL, NETLOGON, and file-based domain services where required.
ADWS access for AD PowerShell discovery and management tooling where required.
Modern Windows dynamic RPC range, configurable.

Site-link-derived arrows show possible topology relationships from AD configuration. They do not prove direct network reachability, active replication connections, or current KCC bridgehead selection.
Replication health rows are read-only evidence from configured connection objects and observed replication metadata. They are not remediation actions and do not prove network reachability.
